---
title: "Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation Practice Implications"
description: "Practice synthesis for Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation."
book_id: "handbook-practical-program-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Practice"
citation_key: "newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch01-chapter-1-planning-and-designing-useful-evaluations:c0003"
  - "table:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:table:table-1-1:p0069:r0254"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-1:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch02-chapter-2-analyzing-and-engaging-stakeholders:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch03-chapter-3-using-logic-models:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch04-chapter-4-exploratory-evaluation:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch05-chapter-5-performance-measurement:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch06-chapter-6-comparison-group-designs:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch07-chapter-7-randomized-controlled-trials:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch08-chapter-8-conducting-case-studies:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch09-chapter-9-recruitment-and-retention-of-study-participants:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch10-chapter-10-designing-managing-and-analyzing-multisite-evaluations:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---

## Source

This practice synthesis draws on the chapter notes from *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation* [@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation].

## Evaluation Practice Implications

- Start with intended users, information needs, and feasible decisions before choosing methods.
- Use logic models, exploratory evaluation, and evaluability assessment to clarify whether a program is ready for more definitive evaluation.
- Treat data collection as a design problem: records, surveys, fieldwork, interviews, observations, focus groups, and stories each answer different questions.
- Use causal designs only when assignment, comparison, measurement, and implementation conditions support the claim being made.
- Build quality checks into recruitment, retention, fieldwork, coding, statistical analysis, reporting, and contracting.
- Make analysis transparent enough that users can see how findings were produced and where limitations remain.
- Use cost-effectiveness, cost-benefit analysis, and evidence synthesis when decision makers need to compare value or prior evidence.
- Write recommendations and reports that flow from findings and are shaped for the audience that can act on them.
- Treat politics, procurement, standards, ethics, and organizational evaluation capacity as central to whether evaluation evidence is used.

## Links

- [Chapter 1: Planning and Designing Useful Evaluations](chapter-01-planning-and-designing-useful-evaluations.qmd)
- [Chapter 2: Analyzing and Engaging Stakeholders](chapter-02-analyzing-and-engaging-stakeholders.qmd)
- [Chapter 3: Using Logic Models](chapter-03-using-logic-models.qmd)
- [Chapter 4: Exploratory Evaluation](chapter-04-exploratory-evaluation.qmd)
- [Chapter 5: Performance Measurement](chapter-05-performance-measurement.qmd)
- [Chapter 6: Comparison Group Designs](chapter-06-comparison-group-designs.qmd)
- [Chapter 7: Randomized Controlled Trials](chapter-07-randomized-controlled-trials.qmd)
- [Chapter 8: Conducting Case Studies](chapter-08-conducting-case-studies.qmd)
- [Chapter 9: Recruitment and Retention of Study Participants](chapter-09-recruitment-and-retention-of-study-participants.qmd)
- [Chapter 10: Designing, Managing, and Analyzing Multisite Evaluations](chapter-10-designing-managing-and-analyzing-multisite-evaluations.qmd)
- [Chapter 11: Evaluating Community Change Programs](chapter-11-evaluating-community-change-programs.qmd)
- [Chapter 12: Culturally Responsive Evaluation](chapter-12-culturally-responsive-evaluation.qmd)
- [Chapter 13: Using Agency Records](chapter-13-using-agency-records.qmd)
- [Chapter 14: Using Surveys](chapter-14-using-surveys.qmd)
- [Chapter 15: Role Playing](chapter-15-role-playing.qmd)
- [Chapter 16: Using Ratings by Trained Observers](chapter-16-using-ratings-by-trained-observers.qmd)
- [Chapter 17: Collecting Data in the Field](chapter-17-collecting-data-in-the-field.qmd)
- [Chapter 18: Using the Internet](chapter-18-using-the-internet.qmd)
- [Chapter 19: Semi-Structured Interviews](chapter-19-semi-structured-interviews.qmd)
- [Chapter 20: Focus Group Interviewing](chapter-20-focus-group-interviewing.qmd)
- [Chapter 21: Using Stories in Evaluation](chapter-21-using-stories-in-evaluation.qmd)
- [Chapter 22: Analyzing Qualitative Data](chapter-22-analyzing-qualitative-data.qmd)
- [Chapter 23: Using Statistics in Evaluation](chapter-23-using-statistics-in-evaluation.qmd)
- [Chapter 24: Cost-Effectiveness and Cost-Benefit Analysis](chapter-24-cost-effectiveness-and-cost-benefit-analysis.qmd)
- [Chapter 25: Meta-Analyses, Systematic Reviews, and Evaluation Syntheses](chapter-25-meta-analyses-systematic-reviews-and-evaluation-syntheses.qmd)
- [Chapter 26: Pitfalls in Evaluations](chapter-26-pitfalls-in-evaluations.qmd)
- [Chapter 27: Writing Recommendations](chapter-27-writing-recommendations.qmd)
- [Chapter 28: Writing Evaluation Reports](chapter-28-writing-evaluation-reports.qmd)
- [Chapter 29: Contracting for Evaluation Products and Services](chapter-29-contracting-for-evaluation-products-and-services.qmd)
- [Chapter 30: Evaluation in Government and the Politics of Evaluation](chapter-30-evaluation-in-government-and-the-politics-of-evaluation.qmd)
- [Chapter 31: Evaluation Challenges, Issues, and Trends](chapter-31-evaluation-challenges-issues-and-trends.qmd)

## Source Records

- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch01-chapter-1-planning-and-designing-useful-evaluations:c0003`
- `table:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:table:table-1-1:p0069:r0254`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-1:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch02-chapter-2-analyzing-and-engaging-stakeholders:c0001`

- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch04-chapter-4-exploratory-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch05-chapter-5-performance-measurement:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch06-chapter-6-comparison-group-designs:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch07-chapter-7-randomized-controlled-trials:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch08-chapter-8-conducting-case-studies:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch09-chapter-9-recruitment-and-retention-of-study-participants:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch10-chapter-10-designing-managing-and-analyzing-multisite-evaluations:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch11-chapter-11-evaluating-community-change-programs:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch12-chapter-12-culturally-responsive-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch13-chapter-13-using-agency-records:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-2:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch14-chapter-14-using-surveys:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch15-chapter-15-role-playing:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch16-chapter-16-using-ratings-by-trained-observers:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch17-chapter-17-collecting-data-in-the-field:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch18-chapter-18-using-the-internet:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch19-chapter-19-semi-structured-interviews:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch20-chapter-20-focus-group-interviewing:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch21-chapter-21-using-stories-in-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch22-chapter-22-analyzing-qualitative-data:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-3:c0002`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch23-chapter-23-using-statistics-in-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch24-chapter-24-cost-effectiveness-and-cost-benefit-analysis:c0023`
- `table_segment:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:table:table-24-6:p0695:r0254:s002`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch25-chapter-25-meta-analyses-systematic-reviews-and-evaluation-syntheses:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch26-chapter-26-pitfalls-in-evaluations:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-4:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch27-chapter-27-writing-recommendations:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch28-chapter-28-writing-evaluation-reports:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch29-chapter-29-contracting-for-evaluation-products-and-services:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch30-chapter-30-evaluation-in-government-and-the-politics-of-evaluation:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch31-chapter-31-evaluation-challenges-issues-and-trends:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch31-chapter-31-evaluation-challenges-issues-and-trends:c0009`

## References
